title: GEEPAS 2-in-1 Clothes Steam Press & Dry Iron | 40s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Ceramic Soleplate & Adjustable Temperature| 220ml Water Tank with 0.8g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 2400W Purple
features: ✅ POWERFUL 2400W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 40 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ CERAMIC SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a ceramic soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (25g/min) or steam burst (0.8g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 220ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 220ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 25g/min and a steam boost of 0.8g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.

✅ SAFETY & SELF-CLEANING FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe. The built-in self-cleaning function helps prevent limescale buildup, maintaining optimal performance and extending the iron’s lifespan.
description: Product Description POWERFUL STEAM BOOST Tackles even the most stubborn creases and wrinkles. PRECISE TEMPERATURE CONTROL Achieve perfect ironing results on all fabric types. CERAMIC COATER SOLEPLATE Effortlessly power through your ironing pile. 220ML WATER TANK Large water tank capacity, Filling it completely, you can iron a large number of clothes without adding extra water.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Anti- Drip & Calc Function, Continuous Steam Technology, Spray & Steam Burst Setting, Steam Boost Function, Vertical Steaming
